description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a central open courtyard featuring a large swimming pool surrounded by lounge chairs. The structure is rectangular, with rooms arranged around the pool, maximizing natural light and providing direct access to the courtyard from multiple points. Large floor-to-ceiling windows and sliding glass doors dominate the inner facades facing the pool, while the exterior walls are mostly solid with minimal fenestration for privacy. The interior layout includes several bedrooms, bathrooms, a spacious living and dining area, and what appears to be a kitchen and utility spaces. The color palette is predominantly white with touches of gray and blue, giving the building a clean, contemporary look. The materials used are primarily concrete, glass, and metal, with some visible wooden elements in the poolside furniture.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a central courtyard pool, surrounded by large windows and minimalist white facades.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the rear side of the bungalow with solid white walls and minimal windows, highlighting the privacy of the exterior.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the side of the bungalow with a small entrance platform and a few windows, emphasizing the building's rectangular footprint.
description_view_2: View 2 reveals the opposite side with more windows and a glimpse into the open-plan living and dining areas adjacent to the pool.
description_view_3: View 3 is the front view, showcasing the central swimming pool, lounge chairs, and the main glass doors leading into the bungalow's interior.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped inner courtyard windows
